hero.title: Ukujoyina i-IATF
hero.lead: Ubulungu buvulelekile. Kukho iindlela ezininzi zokuthatha inxaxheba, nokuba uxhomekeke kubuchwephesha bokuncedisa, ukwakha isoftware efikelelekayo, ukuguqulela, ukuvavanya, okanye ukugcina iprojekthi. Iingxoxo kunye nezigqibo zenzeka esidlangalaleni kwiGitHub nakwiDiscord.

items: Cela iprojekthi. Ukuba ufumana umqobo wokufikeleleka onokusonjululwa yi-software yomthombo ovulekileyo kawonke-wonke, thumela isicelo ngokwamkelwa kwesicelo.
Uvavanyo kunye nophononongo. Zama iiprojekthi ze-IATF ngetekhnoloji yokuncedisa oyisebenzisayo, xela ukuba yintoni esebenzayo nengasebenziyo, kwaye ufake imiba ngqo kwindawo yokugcina efanelekileyo.
Guqulela. Umxholo womthombo upapashwa ngesiNgesi kuqala. Iinguqulelo zongezwa njengoko abancedisi befumaneka, ukuqala ngeSpanish.
Yakha. Khetha imiba kuyo nayiphi na indawo yokugcina i-IATF, thumela izicelo zokutsala, okanye uthathe iprojekthi njengenjineli yayo enoxanduva.
Gcina. Iiprojekthi ezikhoyo ngamanye amaxesha zifuna umgcini omtsha.
I-GitHub. Imiba, izicelo zokutsala, ukukhutshwa, kunye neerekhodi zeprojekthi.
Ukungavisisani. Ingxoxo ephilileyo, ukulungelelanisa, kunye nemibuzo engacwangciswanga.
Iimeyile. Ukusetyenziswa contact@iatf.cc ukuba iGitHub okanye iDiscord ayilunganga.

header.title: Khetha ijelo elihambelana nendlela ofuna ukufaka isandla ngayo

paragraphs: Zonke iziteshi zondla kuhlalutyo olufanayo loluntu kunye noovimba abafanayo boluntu.
